name: The Last Drive-in: Just Joe Bob
original_name: The Last Drive-in: Just Joe Bob
overview: All the rants, raves, reviews you can handle... without the movies. Gather round with JBB, Darcy and the whole Drive-in crew for the segments and commentary from all of The Last Drive-in. No films, just Joe Bob.

trailers.title: The Last Drive-In with Joe Bob Briggs Series - Official Trailer [HD] | A Shudder Original Series
